description: Caramel coloured kurta, has a round neckline, mock three buttoned placket, teal embroidered detail around the neckline and placket, long sleeves with ties at the cuffs which has golden detail on it, front and back yoke with golden stitched and sequinned detail, teal embroidered detail below the bust with beaded, sequinned and button like embellishments, brown embroidery at the hemline and lining
